uhh shit he/him for guest they/them for user you can gaslight the bot to use others though probably

the little tagging area is the worst part of bot making for me… I might change up the format to be all cutesy like some creators do. and have a template. not sure what exactly I wanna do tho especially given images still aren’t back… is there a way to embed from catbox or something maybe

btw other bot creators… and users who understand tokens pretty well…. is ~200 personality tokens like…. enough?? I’ve heard bots get a bit funky with too many and all but idk how much too many is(but obviously 200 isn’t) and my bots don’t tend to need backstory i think. the ones that do(like sebastian) have them but pre-forsaken stuff is kinda just people?? and all i feel the need to add is personality + looks + relationship status if needed
